name: python3-alembic
title: python3-alembic
summary: lightweight database migration tool for SQLAlchemy - Python module
description:
lightweight database migration tool for SQLAlchemy - Python module
Alembic is a new database migration tool, written by the author
of SQLAlchemy. A migration tool offers the following functionality:
.
* Can emit ALTER statements to a database in order to change the
structure of tables and other constructs
* Provides a system whereby "migration scripts" may be constructed;
each script indicates a particular series of steps that can
"upgrade" a target database to a new version, and optionally a
series of steps that can "downgrade" similarly, doing the same
steps in reverse.
* Allows the scripts to execute in some sequential manner.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-alembic because lightweight database migration tool for SQLAlchemy - Python module.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-alembic as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-alembic with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-alembic --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
